notes: Captured through local Playwright + system Chrome.
Only navigation tabs and view-mode buttons were clicked.
State-changing controls such as Set, Start, Stop, Restore, Restart, Upload, Delete and Firmware actions were not clicked.

interactions.name: Configuration / Server
interactions.bodyTextSample: PTS-2 controller ver. 2026.06.24 17:06:33 root Actions Configuration / Remote server Settings Pumps Probes Grades Payments Tanks Nozzles Boards Readers Parameters Wireless Server Users REMOTE SERVER SETTINGS Server IPv4 address Sets IP-address in IPv4 in format xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx. If there is no static IP-address available - then set here value [masked] and below set the server domain name. Domain name Domain name (if exists) Server user Credentials for remote server access are taken from user configuration admin root diegoAPI test test1 Use device identifier as login Timeout of server response Sets the maximum period in seconds to wait for a message from the server (response in case of data upload data or a new request in case of WebSocket communication) Secret key Secret key used for messages signature. Usage of digital signature ensures messages' authentication and integrity. Parameter is optional. Set the flag if necessary to update the value, if the flag is not set - then a previously entered value is to be used. Update previously entered value Secret key is not entered Status of connection to server Shows if the controller can connect to the server. Communication using HTTP requests Upload pump transactions Sets polling by the controller to remote server for upload of performed pump transactions Server request URI Server request URI without starting slash Upload tank measurements Sets polling by the controller to remote server for upload of registered tank measurements Server request URI Server request URI without starting slash Upload in-tank deliveries Sets polling by
